acceptance_criteria.description: Ring 1 and Ring 2 prompt template modules compile without errors
Ring 1 exports four prompt-building functions (R1-T01 through R1-T04) and Ring 2 exports five prompt-building functions (R2-T01 through R2-T05) matching the templates in docs/03-atomic-task-schema.md
acceptance_criteria.rubric: Verify: (1) ring1.ts exports functions for R1-T01 coverageCompleteness, R1-T02 contradictionDetection, R1-T03 scopeCoherence, R1-T04 dependencyCorrectness. Each takes document content and context parameters and returns a prompt string. (2) ring2.ts exports functions for R2-T01 actionability, R2-T02 scopeBoundedness, R2-T03 approachSpecificity, R2-T04 constraintTestability, R2-T05 criterionCompleteness. Each takes document content and returns a prompt string. (3) Each prompt asks exactly one question and specifies structured JSON output. (4) Prompt content matches the canonical templates from docs/03-atomic-task-schema.md. PASS if all match. FAIL if any missing or divergent.
